projectDescription: Multi-platform gamepad firmware for the Raspberry Pi Pico and other RP2040 boards, featuring ultra-low latency, 14+ input modes, and a built-in web configurator.
keyFeatures: 14+ input modes including XInput, PS3/PS4/PS5, Nintendo Switch, Xbox One, and Keyboard
Ultra-low input latency averaging 0.76ms in XInput mode at 1000Hz polling
Multiple SOCD cleaning modes (Up Priority, Neutral, Second Input Priority, First Input Priority, Bypass)
Built-in web configurator accessible via browser — no software installation required
Per-button RGB LED support with multiple animation effects
Extensive add-on system for analog inputs, turbo, display, macros, USB host passthrough, and more
Support for 128x64 I2C OLED displays (SSD1306, SH1106, SH1107)
Compatible with PC, PS3, PS4, PS5, Nintendo Switch, Xbox One, Steam Deck, MiSTer, and Android
50+ supported hardware boards including Raspberry Pi Pico, FlatBox, OpenCore, and many more
Input macro system with configurable press, hold-repeat, and toggle modes
publicApiSurface: InputMode enum (XInput, Switch, PS3, PS4, PS5, XBone, Keyboard, HID, and more)
GpioAction enum (button mappings, D-pad, analog directions, macros, hotkeys)
SOCDMode enum (UP_PRIORITY, NEUTRAL, SECOND_INPUT_PRIORITY, FIRST_INPUT_PRIORITY, BYPASS)
GamepadHotkey enum (mode switching, SOCD, LED controls, profile loading)
ButtonLayout / ButtonLayoutRight enums (Stick, Stickless, Vewlix, Capcom, custom, and more)
Add-on modules: Analog, Turbo, SOCD Slider, Tilt, Reverse, Input Macro, Wii Extension, SNES, USB Host, Rotary Encoder, HE Trigger
Web Configurator REST API (pin mapping, settings, LED config, add-on config, backup/restore)
AnimationEffects enum (Static Color, Rainbow, Chase, Static Theme, Custom Theme)
DpadMode enum (Digital, Left Analog, Right Analog)
Display config: SplashMode, DisplaySaverMode, I2C display support
